en: Ah, you destroyer, who yourself have not been destroyed, you traitor, whom none has betrayed! When you have ceased to destroy, you will be destroyed; and when you have finished betraying, they will betray you.
zh: 你這毀滅人， 自己卻不被毀滅的； 你這行事詭詐，別人倒不以詭詐待你的，有禍了！ 你剛停止毀滅人的時候，自己就要被毀滅； 你剛停止行詭詐的時候，別人就必以詭詐待你。

en: O LORD, be gracious to us; we wait for you. Be our arm every morning, our salvation in the time of trouble.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你施恩給我們；我們等候你。 每天早晨，願你作我們的膀臂， 在遭難的時候，作我們的拯救。

en: At the tumultuous noise peoples flee; when you lift yourself up, nations are scattered,
zh: 喧嚷的聲音一發，眾民必逃跑； 你一興起，列國就四散。

en: and your spoil is gathered as the caterpillar gathers; as locusts leap, it is leapt upon.
zh: 列國啊！你們所擄掠的必被收取， 像螞蚱收取禾稼一樣； 蝗蟲怎樣為食物忙碌走動，人也怎樣在擄物上忙亂。

en: The LORD is exalted, for he dwells on high; he will fill Zion with justice and righteousness,
zh: 耶和華必被尊崇，因為他居住在高天； 他必以公平與公義充滿錫安。

en: and he will be the stability of your times, abundance of salvation, wisdom, and knowledge; the fear of the LORD is Zion's treasure.
zh: 他是你一生一世的保障、 豐盛的救恩、智慧和知識； 敬畏耶和華就是他的至寶。

en: Behold, their heroes cry in the streets; the envoys of peace weep bitterly.
zh: 看哪！他們的勇士在街上呼叫； 和平的使者在痛苦哭泣。

en: The highways lie waste; the traveler ceases. Covenants are broken; cities are despised; there is no regard for man.
zh: 大路荒涼，過路的人絕跡； 敵人背約，藐視約章， 不尊重任何人。

en: The land mourns and languishes; Lebanon is confounded and withers away; Sharon is like a desert, and Bashan and Carmel shake off their leaves.
zh: 大地悲哀衰殘， 黎巴嫩羞慚枯乾； 沙崙好像荒原， 巴珊和迦密的樹木凋零。

en: "Now I will arise," says the LORD, "now I will lift myself up; now I will be exalted.
zh: 耶和華說：“現在我要起來， 現在我要興起，現在我要被人尊崇。

en: You conceive chaff; you give birth to stubble; your breath is a fire that will consume you.
zh: 你們所懷的是糠秕，所生的是碎稭； 我的氣息必像火一般吞滅你們。

en: And the peoples will be as if burned to lime, like thorns cut down, that are burned in the fire."
zh: 眾民必像燃燒的石灰， 又像被割下的荊棘，在火中焚燒。

en: Hear, you who are far off, what I have done; and you who are near, acknowledge my might.
zh: 遠方的人哪！你們要聽我所作的事； 近處的人哪！你們要承認我的大能。”

en: The sinners in Zion are afraid; trembling has seized the godless: "Who among us can dwell with the consuming fire? Who among us can dwell with everlasting burnings?"
zh: 在錫安的罪人都恐懼； 戰兢抓住了不敬虔的人： “我們中間誰能與吞滅一切的火同住呢？ 我們中間誰能與不斷燃燒的火同住呢？”

en: He who walks righteously and speaks uprightly, who despises the gain of oppressions, who shakes his hands, lest they hold a bribe, who stops his ears from hearing of bloodshed and shuts his eyes from looking on evil,
zh: 那行事公義，說話正直， 拒絕不義的財利， 搖手不受賄賂， 塞耳不聽血腥的事， 閉眼不看邪惡的事的，

en: he will dwell on the heights; his place of defense will be the fortresses of rocks; his bread will be given him; his water will be sure.
zh: 這樣的人必居住在高處， 他的保障必在堅固的磐石上， 他的糧食必有供應， 他的水源永不斷絕。

en: Your eyes will behold the king in his beauty; they will see a land that stretches afar.
zh: 你必親眼看見王的榮美， 必看見遼闊之地。

en: Your heart will muse on the terror: "Where is he who counted, where is he who weighed the tribute? Where is he who counted the towers?"
zh: 你的心必默想已往的恐懼，說： “那記數目的在哪裡？ 那稱貢銀的在哪裡？ 那數點城樓的在哪裡呢？”

en: You will see no more the insolent people, the people of an obscure speech that you cannot comprehend, stammering in a tongue that you cannot understand.
zh: 你必不再見那強暴的民了， 就是那說話深奧，難以明白， 舌頭結巴，難以聽懂的民。

en: Behold Zion, the city of our appointed feasts! Your eyes will see Jerusalem, an untroubled habitation, an immovable tent, whose stakes will never be plucked up, nor will any of its cords be broken.
zh: 你要看著錫安，就是我們舉行制定節期的城， 你必看見耶路撒冷，是一個安全的居所， 一個不挪移的帳幕， 它的橛子永不會拔起來， 它的繩索也不會扯斷。

en: But there the LORD in majesty will be for us a place of broad rivers and streams, where no galley with oars can go, nor majestic ship can pass.
zh: 在那裡，威嚴的耶和華必作我們江河寬渠溢流之地。 必沒有盪槳搖櫓的船隻能在其上往來， 威武的戰船也不能經過。

en: For the LORD is our judge; the LORD is our lawgiver; the LORD is our king; he will save us.
zh: 因為耶和華是我們的審判者， 耶和華是我們的立法者， 耶和華是我們的君王， 他必拯救我們。

en: Your cords hang loose; they cannot hold the mast firm in its place or keep the sail spread out. Then prey and spoil in abundance will be divided; even the lame will take the prey.
zh: 現在你的繩索雖然鬆開， 不能綁緊桅杆， 也不能揚起帆來， 但到那時，許多擄物必被你們瓜分， 甚至瘸腿的也能把掠物掠去。

en: And no inhabitant will say, "I am sick"; the people who dwell there will be forgiven their iniquity.
zh: 以色列的居民必不再說：“我有病”； 因為在其中居住的，罪孽必得赦免。
